name: Follett Destiny Library Management API
what_it_does: Follett Destiny REST API for K-12 school library management system. Enables AI agents to manage library catalog and resource discovery, handle book and resource circulation and checkouts, access patron (student and teacher) borrowing records, manage inventory and collection development, retrieve overdue and fine tracking data, integrate with SIS systems for patron sync, access resource usage analytics, and connect library data with learning management systems and digital resource platforms.
use_cases: Managing library catalog and resource discovery from library automation agents
Tracking book circulation and checkout status from library operations agents
Syncing patron data with SIS from library enrollment agents
Retrieving collection usage analytics from library analytics agents
not_for: Public library systems without K-12 school library focus
Academic university libraries without K-12 school context
Non-library resource management without circulation and catalog workflows
best_when: A K-12 school district or school library using Follett Destiny wants AI agents to automate catalog management, patron circulation, SIS integration, and resource usage analytics.
avoid_when: FERPA+COPPA: Student borrowing records are educational records protected under FERPA. Patron records for students under 13 have additional COPPA protections. Library patron data has special privacy protections under state library privacy laws (in many states, library records are confidential).

auth.notes: Follett Destiny uses API key authentication. District-level credentials. No granular scope control. Limited public developer documentation. Integration primarily via SIS sync and partner program. Destiny API access available for integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — K-12 library enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: McHenry, Illinois. Follett Corporation founded 1873. Destiny Library Manager used in 80,000+ K-12 schools. Market leader for K-12 school library management. Also offers Destiny Resource Manager for broader resource management. Competes with SirsiDynix and open-source Koha for school libraries.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA+COPPA: Student borrowing records are educational records protected — district DSA required
No public MCP server — API key with limited documentation
No webhooks — polling required for circulation updates
Library patron data has additional state privacy protections beyond FERPA in many states
No granular scopes — API key grants full library system access
SIS integration via OneRoster or dedicated Destiny SIS connector — not native API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Student library patron data. FERPA, COPPA. API key only. US data residency. State library privacy laws may provide additional protections.

security_score_components.security_notes: Student library data. FERPA, COPPA. API key only. US data residency. State library privacy laws.
